name: The Whale Painting with Secret Door

system.description: Huge painting in Villa Cilesterino's dining room depicting a whale swallowing entire ships. Behind the painting is hidden a mechanism that opens a secret door leading to the Secret Laboratory in the cellar. By looking behind the painting, the Hunters can activate the mechanism and access Antonio's underground alchemical laboratory where the most horrific experiments take place. The whale imagery is a direct reference to Pinocchio's tale.
system.location: Villa Cilesterino - Dining room, north wall
